final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing Xiaohongshu-style 9-grid cover vertical image for a UGC creator post featuring the DJI Pocket 4 product.

Style/medium: Xiaohongshu 素人 (everyday-creator) aesthetic, warm and approachable, flat-lay + lifestyle hybrid, 9-grid cover format
Composition: 9-grid (九宫格) layout, vertical portrait orientation, product DJI Pocket 4 prominently featured at center or foreground, central title text overlaid in a cute, differentiated font
Subject: 素人 UGC creator holding or showcasing the DJI Pocket 4 camera; product clearly identifiable as a small handheld gimbal camera
Scene/backdrop: cozy lifestyle backdrop consistent with Xiaohongshu 素人 content — soft neutral or warm-toned room / café / outdoor natural light setting
Lighting/mood: soft, warm, natural light; approachable and relatable, not overly polished or commercial
Color palette: warm neutrals with soft accent tones (cream, beige, warm white) consistent with Xiaohongshu 素人 feed aesthetic
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): 大疆pocket4初体验
Constraints: title text "大疆pocket4初体验" must appear at center of the cover in a cute, differentiated (非常规) font style; 9-grid cover format must be respected; product must read as DJI Pocket 4
Avoid: overly commercial advertising look, cold corporate lighting, generic stock-photo style, standard sans-serif or boring fonts for the title
